---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Stackup
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `stackup ...`
2. With this config: (paste relevant stackup.yml)
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full error output.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- Stackup version: (`stackup version`)
- Docker version: (`docker --version`)
- Docker Compose version: (`docker compose version`)
